title: hopea depressinerva
intro:
Hopea depressinerva is a species of plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae, commonly known as the Malvaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asia for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hopea depressinerva are said to include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as providing antioxidant properties. Hopea depressinerva can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.

Note: More information about this plant is not widely available, therefore, the provided information is based on limited sources and may not be comprehensive.
